summary: Completed full backend testing of Precision ERP P2 layer (integrations, PDF, GSTR CSVs, 2FA TOTP, audit log). 26/26 tests passed including regression sanity for P1 endpoints. Admin restored to clean state (2FA disabled) post-test.

minor.issue: ITC (A)(5) row uses a heuristic: it splits in_gst across CGST/SGST and zeroes IGST only if NO invoice in the period is interstate. This logic is based on output invoices, not input expenses, so an inter-state purchase will still be split as CGST/SGST. Consider tracking expense.is_interstate at expense level for accurate ITC bucketing.
Webhook does not record an audit log entry on lead creation, while WhatsApp/email/Indiamart paths do. Recommend adding write_audit('tradeindia_webhook', ...) for traceability.
Returns 400 'already enabled' rather than supporting re-issue of a new secret after disable+re-enable cycle. Works after disable (which clears totp_secret), but flow could be more explicit.

action_items: Optional: add audit log on tradeindia webhook lead creation
Optional: improve GSTR-3B ITC bucketing using per-expense interstate flag
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1500 lines — recommend splitting into routers (auth.py, accounting.py, integrations.py, inventory.py, hr.py) to stay <700 lines per file.
Webhook endpoint /api/integrations/tradeindia/webhook accepts token via Query string and compares with == (string equality). For production, use hmac.compare_digest to mitigate timing attacks.
2FA secret is stored in plaintext on the user document. Consider encrypting at rest with a server-side key.
/api/email/send and /api/whatsapp/send are gated only by get_current_user (any authenticated user). Should likely be restricted to roles like admin/manager/sales to prevent abuse.
PDF endpoints lack role-restriction (only require auth). Consider restricting invoice PDF download to accountant/admin/manager.
Indiamart sync calls external HTTP with no retry/backoff; httpx timeout=30 is reasonable but failures are swallowed into a generic 502 message.
test_credentials: admin@erp.com / Admin@123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md); a transient sales user is created per session for role-deny tests.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed customer, supplier, invoice, quotation, PO, inventory item for PDF + regression tests; cleared integration settings to defaults at start and end. Admin 2FA was enabled mid-test and explicitly disabled at the end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features all working: GET/PUT /api/settings/integrations (admin-only with 403 for non-admin), POST /api/whatsapp/send & /api/email/send & /api/integrations/indiamart/sync all return 400 when not configured, /api/integrations/tradeindia/webhook returns 401 with bad token / 200 with correct token / dedupes on external_id, /api/{invoices,quotations,purchase-orders}/{id}/pdf return application/pdf with %PDF magic header, /api/accounting/gstr1.csv has full GSTR-1 header, /api/accounting/gstr3b.csv contains 'GSTR-3B Summary' and 'Net GST Payable', 2FA full lifecycle (setup→enable→login-with-totp→disable) works using pyotp.TOTP(secret).now(), audit log captures 2fa_enable/2fa_disable, non-admin role gets 403 on /api/settings/integrations and /api/audit-logs. Admin login still works without TOTP after teardown. Run tests via: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/test_p2_integrations.py -v
